segments.caption: The video opens with a vibrant title screen displaying 'Microsoft Build' against a colorful, abstract background, setting a futuristic and energetic tone. The scene transitions to the Microsoft Bing interface, where a user selects the 'More Creative' conversation style and types a request to create an inspiring, cool video script celebrating developers in the age of AI for Microsoft Build. The AI responds with a message, 'Sure, I can do that for you,' followed by a dynamic, animated text sequence that reads, 'We’re entering a new era of AI. Where you will be able to build as fast as your imagination.' This text overlays various scenes: a young girl in a superhero costume running through a field, a Formula 1 car racing on a track, and a crowd of excited spectators at a sports event. The narrative continues with the AI-generated text, 'Where your creativity will have no constraints,' as the visuals shift to a group of people in a modern office environment, engaged in collaborative work. The final text, 'And you can focus on the big picture,' appears over a scene of a doctor shaking hands with a patient in a clinical setting, emphasizing the human-centric impact of AI. Throughout, the visuals are vibrant, fast-paced, and designed to evoke inspiration and innovation, aligning with the theme of AI empowering developers and creators.

segments.caption: The video opens with a close-up of Satya Nadella, Chairman and CEO of Microsoft, walking confidently across the stage at the Microsoft Build event. He is dressed in a dark navy hoodie over a gray shirt, black pants, and black sneakers with white soles, and he gestures expressively as he speaks. The stage is illuminated with vibrant blue and purple lighting, and the backdrop features the 'Microsoft Build' title screen with its bold, modern font and gradient colors of orange, yellow, and purple. As the camera pulls back, the full stage and audience come into view, revealing a large, engaged Conference Hall Audience seated in rows, many raising their hands or recording the moment. The stage is flanked by massive screens displaying the same 'Microsoft Build' branding. Nadella then moves to the center of the stage, where a new presentation slide titled 'Pursuit of the Dream Machine' appears. The slide features a timeline of pivotal moments in computing history, including 'As We May Think' (1945), 'Man-Computer Symbiosis' (1960), 'The Mother of All Demos' (1968), Xerox Alto (1972), PC/Server (1976), World Wide Web (1990), iPhone/Cloud (2007), and ChatGPT (2022). Nadella walks along the stage, pointing to each milestone as he explains the evolution of technology, emphasizing the progression toward AI-driven innovation. His movements are deliberate and engaging, and he uses hand gestures to underscore key points, particularly when discussing the 2022 ChatGPT milestone. The atmosphere is dynamic and forward-looking, with the audience’s attention fixed on the speaker and the evolving visual narrative on the screens.

The stage features modern lighting with vertical blue and teal light strips, and the floor is marked with 'Microsoft Build' in white lettering. The overall atmosphere is professional, tech-focused, and forward-looking, emphasizing innovation in developer tools and cross-platform development.

segments.caption: The video begins with a dynamic, abstract blue and purple animated background, transitioning into the Windows 11 desktop interface featuring a vibrant blue, flowing ribbon wallpaper. The taskbar displays the new 'Search' bar and icons, including the Windows Copilot icon, which is clicked to open the Copilot sidebar. The Copilot interface appears with a clean, minimalist design, offering AI-powered assistance. The user types a query, 'How can I adjust my system to get work done?', and Copilot responds with personalized tips, including enabling a focus timer and switching to Dark Theme. The user selects 'Yes' to both suggestions, triggering the activation of the focus timer and the dark theme, which changes the desktop to a darker color scheme. The screen then shows multiple open applications, including Visual Studio Code, a dashboard, and system performance widgets, all now in dark mode, emphasizing productivity. The user then asks Copilot to summarize a document titled 'Contoso Business Plan,' and Copilot generates a concise summary. Next, the user asks for music recommendations, and Copilot suggests Spotify playlists like 'Chill Vibes,' 'Brain Food,' and 'Deep Study,' with the user selecting 'Chill Vibes,' which opens Spotify and starts playing music. The user then asks how to create a logo for a coffee business, and Copilot suggests using Adobe Express, launching the app and guiding the user to create a logo with a coffee cup design. The final scene shows the completed logo in Adobe Express, with Copilot confirming the action and offering further assistance, highlighting seamless integration and workflow simplification across apps.

segments.caption: The video opens with Yusuf Mehdi, identified as CVP, Consumer CMO at Microsoft, standing on a stage with a vibrant, abstract gradient background of orange, pink, and purple hues. He is dressed in a black zip-up hoodie over a dark shirt, dark pants, and wears a white smartwatch on his left wrist. He gestures expressively as he speaks, holding a small black device in his right hand. The scene transitions to a wide shot of the stage, revealing a large audience seated in front of him, many recording the event. segments.caption: The video opens with a close-up of Satya Nadella, the Stage Presenter, standing on a dimly lit stage wearing a dark navy hoodie over a gray shirt, black pants, and black sneakers with white soles. He gestures expressively as he speaks, with a large screen behind him displaying the text 'Data analytics for the era of AI' and the four pillars of Microsoft Fabric: 'Unified storage and compute,' 'Unified experience,' 'Unified governance,' and 'Unified business model.' The camera then pulls back to reveal the full stage setup, showcasing a modern, sleek design with vertical light strips in blue and teal hues, and a large audience seated in front. The screen transitions to a new slide titled 'What we build' and then 'Why we build,' as Nadella continues his presentation. The scene shifts to a detailed graph titled 'Pursuit of GDP growth,' showing global GDP in trillions of 2011 GKS on a logarithmic scale from 1000 to today, with key technological revolutions marked along the timeline, including the printing press, steam engines, telegraph, electrification, mass production, internal combustion engine, flight, synthetic fertilizer, and the information revolution. The graph highlights the GDP growth multiplier per century, increasing from 0.4x in 1000–1100 to 20x in the current era, with a projected '+AI' surge. The source is cited as Maddison Project, OurWorldInData.org. The atmosphere is professional and forward-looking, emphasizing the transformative impact of AI on global economic growth.

The scene transitions to a wide shot of a stage at Microsoft Build, where Satya Nadella, dressed in a dark navy hoodie over a gray shirt, black pants, and black sneakers with white soles, walks confidently while gesturing toward the screen. The slide changes to a 'Historical index of human development' graph, showing two lines—one light blue and one magenta—tracking progress from 1870 to today, with the magenta line representing a summary measure of achievement in health, knowledge, and living standards in the United States. Nadella continues to speak, emphasizing points with hand gestures, as the camera zooms in on him. The scene then shifts to a collage of diverse, monochrome images depicting people in various settings—working, collaborating, and using technology—before transitioning to a vibrant, full-color version of the same collage, with Nadella standing in front, continuing his presentation with expressive hand movements. The stage is illuminated with blue and teal lighting, and the 'Microsoft Build' logo is visible on the floor, reinforcing the event's branding.

segments.caption: The video opens with a rural Indian village scene, showing a small shop with hanging snacks and a woman in a yellow and red sari interacting with a vendor, while text overlays state, 'There are many government schemes available to us, but we often don't know about them.' The scene transitions to a young man in a white kurta and cap standing in a dusty village courtyard, speaking directly to the camera. A wide shot reveals a village landscape with a mosque and distant hills. The video then cuts to a modern office setting where Aaditeshwar Seth, identified as Co-Founder of Gram Vaani and Professor at IIT Delhi, speaks in front of desks and chairs. The narrative shifts back to the village, showing an elderly man walking down a narrow lane, followed by a group of women and children gathered near a brick wall. Children in school uniforms walk through a village doorway, transitioning to a classroom where students in colorful headscarves read textbooks. The scene returns to the office, where Smita Gupta, a Lawyer and Technologist at OpenNyAI, speaks in front of a whiteboard. A close-up shows code on a screen, followed by a shot of Abhigyan Raman, Senior AI Researcher at AI4Bharat, discussing with colleagues. The video shows a woman wearing headphones verifying a recording on a tablet, with text in Hindi displayed on the screen. Abhigyan Raman is then seen explaining a diagram on a digital whiteboard, illustrating a system architecture involving 'Govt: Scheme Details,' 'Chat layer (WhatsApp),' 'AI4Bharat Models,' and 'Azure Machine Learning,' while interacting with a colleague. The segment ends with a close-up of Abhigyan Raman speaking passionately, emphasizing the technical and social integration of AI in rural development.
